gate_results.status_reason: Every statement in the packet traces to frozen source truth at evidence pin d62a82f3 (ancestor of import pin 77879e5): 16/16 manifest blob hashes verified, three digests recomputed and matching, v0.2 contract 0 errors. Two logged variances do not defeat provenance: (i) source.issued_at (12:00:00-05:00) predates the evidence pin's commit time (14:14:51) and the issuance commit (14:29) - internally anachronistic, git commit times govern; (ii) RESEARCH-STATUS.md line 124 says 'FIVE independent methods' while the packet's stricter typing (raw_method_count_is_independence_count=false) governs; (iii) the hash_scope freezes bytes but not the runtime closure: tests/W210_decisive_bit_helmholtz.py imports tests/generation-sector/gen_sector_bridge.py, which is OUTSIDE the 16-file hash_scope (verified byte-identical at pin and HEAD, sha256 dc9b8297f392d49147944edfbf9636cda86b2ede7c9f2bf5283bc9396e0a4ec7), so W210's re-execution receipt comes from the pinned repo tree, not the extracted bundle alone.

receiver_judgment.statement: The frozen packet, its 16-artifact bundle, and the receiver assessment all pin the same packet identity and bytes; the two wording/timestamp variances are logged in the import record as receiver-side annotations, not packet edits.
receiver_judgment.grade: exploration-tier receiver-verified structural judgment; confers no promotion of the source claim (exploration) or its grades
receiver_judgment.verification: 16/16 manifest blobs re-extracted from git pin 77879e5 and re-hashed (all match byte_length + content_sha256); manifest/packet/bundle digests recomputed under ptc-frozen-bundle-v1 (match); v0.2 contract validate_packet 0 errors; packet-pair blob sha256s recorded in the import record.

A packet statement cites a source artifact absent from the pinned revision.
nonclaims: This provenance pass does not establish any physical claim or the truth of any method's conclusion.
Logging the issued_at anachronism does not amend the packet; the field stands as issued.
The manifest freezes bytes, not execution environments; the W210 runtime-closure gap is a logged bundle limitation (receiver Annotation E), not a packet defect or edit.

gate_results.status_reason: Both material construction forks are explicit in the frozen packet with transfer status: (1) program-native Krein/C-operator objects vs standard-field machinery (selected: program-native; transfers); (2) grading sign derived-in-form vs posited-in-sign (selected: posited-in-sign, RESIDUAL-BIT-STANDS; does_not_transfer). The Cl(9,5)=M(64,H) rep-canonicity caveat is carried as an explicit conditional construction premise.

receiver_judgment.statement: The construction choices this run depends on are visible, typed, and retained; the does_not_transfer status of fork 2 is exactly the located-not-forced content, so no admissible branch has been silently removed (Construction-Fork Rule respected: both sign branches remain live).
receiver_judgment.grade: exploration-tier receiver-verified structural judgment; confers no promotion of the source claim (exploration) or its grades
receiver_judgment.verification: Both construction_forks read from the frozen packet with transfer_status; the rep-canonicity caveat is carried as premise P-CL95-REPCANON (conditional_in_source) and as limiting premise in GU-001-IA-001.

falsifiers: A materially admissible construction branch is absent from the frozen packet.

The run's conclusions require the standard-field branch where the packet only established the program-native one (fork 2's transfer_status = does_not_transfer marks precisely where transfer would fail).

The rep-canonicity caveat is not discharged; it is carried.

gate_results.status_reason: One coherent joint object forms without changing source meanings: GU's good-stable structure plus exactly one external Z/2 datum at a typed GU/TI/TaF boundary. All five methods address the same frame, the same fork, and the same external datum (all five share all five load-bearing premises); the joint argument is the single frozen artifact W211. Formation succeeds only under receiver Annotation A: the '=' chains in P-EXTERNAL-C-OPERATOR and the 'TaF-owned finality activation' apposition inside claim.statement are read as typed-interface descriptions per the packet's own nonclaims, with the 2026-07-15 adapter-2 correction governing.

receiver_judgment.statement: The five method results are interpretable over one declared object (the good-stable structure with one residual Z/2 at a typed boundary) without rewriting any source statement; the only reading that would break coherence - taking the premise-ledger '=' chain as established cross-repo identity - is exactly what Annotation A and the source's own nonclaims forbid.
receiver_judgment.grade: exploration-tier receiver-verified structural judgment; confers no promotion of the source claim (exploration) or its grades
receiver_judgment.verification: The joint object was formed from packet fields only (question, claim, method_ledger, interfaces) under annotations A/B/C; no source wording was altered (validate_assessment source_wording checks pass).

falsifiers: The methods cannot be interpreted over the same declared object without altering a source meaning.
Forming the joint object requires asserting the withdrawn bar(b)=finality-axis-polarity identity (ADAPTER2-01); the run would then FAIL formation, not annotate it.
nonclaims: Formation does not imply evidential independence among the five methods (they are one dependence-driven unit per GU-001-IA-001).
Formation does not identify the external datum with any specific TaF object; that identification is OPEN.

gate_results.status_reason: The residual survives the agreed completions and null classes carried by the packet: (i) 'compute harder inside GU' is ruled out by the five-method convergence (each method IS a completion attempt in a different register - invariance, cohomology, fixed-point, internal logic, variational - and all leave the bit free); (ii) refining the good-stable structure ENLARGES the invariant-form space (dim 2 -> 4), never shrinks it to 1; (iii) the null-class test fails to absorb the bit: the two branches are not gauge-equivalent (positive-definite vs indefinite physical inner product is a basis-invariant distinction), and the full-group completion that WOULD absorb it (so(9,5) Schur, nulldim=1) is exactly the completion the good-stable conditioning breaks. Scope: only the declared completions are exhausted; unbuilt completions (interacting C-operator, nonlocal Z_U, kappa) are named residuals, not tested completions.

receiver_judgment.statement: Within the packet's declared completion family the residual Z/2 stands; the demonstrated failing direction is real: under the FULL gauge group the residual disappears (nulldim=1), so this gate's test genuinely distinguishes completions that absorb the bit from conditionings that liberate it.
receiver_judgment.grade: exploration-tier receiver-verified structural judgment; confers no promotion of the source claim (exploration) or its grades
receiver_judgment.verification: Declared completions read from /alternatives; null-class check via /quantifiers/4 (refinement enlarges the residual, dim 2 -> 4) and the W203 nulldim=1 guardrail reproduced in every method test; W211 convergence test re-run at pin, exit 0.

falsifiers: An agreed, declared completion absorbs the residual (as the full so(9,5) group in fact does for the ungraded metric - the W203 guardrail every method reproduces).
The residual is shown to lie in a null class (pure relabeling with no invariant distinction between branches).
nonclaims: This does not exhaust all mathematically or physically admissible completions; the unbuilt interacting C-operator and the nonlocal Z_U completion are explicitly untested.
Survival of the residual does not select its value.

gate_results.status_reason: The choice changes capability rather than only representation, access, or description - at the packet's structural grade: the two branches are C_good (eta_+ positive-definite; record-count mode Krein-negative; unitary record sector) and C_path (indefinite; the W178/W186 pathological EP). Signature of the physical inner product on the record-count block is a basis-invariant, so the branch difference survives admissible reformulation and is not a description change. The demonstrated failing direction: on a definite (14,0) frame (W208's matched negative control) the invariant-form space does NOT jump and the fork vanishes - so this gate's discriminator can return null. Qualifier carried: the physical cash-out (loop unitarity, bar(b)) rests on STRUCTURAL/ARGUED lifts and remains OPEN; the pass is about invariant branch-inequivalence, not demonstrated physical issuance.

receiver_judgment.statement: The residual is classified as capability-relevant at exploration/structural grade: the branches differ by an invariant (definiteness of the physical inner product on the record sector), which bounds admissible states and unitarity of record dynamics, not merely their labels; whether nature realizes the capability difference is exactly the OPEN bar(b) question and is not decided here.
receiver_judgment.grade: exploration-tier receiver-verified structural judgment; confers no promotion of the source claim (exploration) or its grades
receiver_judgment.verification: Branch inequivalence rests on the frozen invariant facts: two distinct fixed points C_good (positive-definite eta_+) vs C_path (indefinite) per /quantifiers/1, with the matched (14,0) negative control in W208 (re-run, exit 0) showing the fork vanishes on a definite frame.

falsifiers: Both branches have the same operational possibility set under the declared tests (as actually happens on the (14,0) definite control frame, where the gate's discriminator correctly reports no fork).
The definite/indefinite distinction is shown to be removable by an admissible change of representation.
nonclaims: This classification is not evidence that a real physical capability change occurs; bar(b), H59, Krein positivity, and physical issuance remain OPEN.
Encoding-level facts (finite (9,5) linear-algebra models) are not asserted as formalism-level facts; the lifts are STRUCTURAL/ARGUED as graded in the packet.

gate_results.status_reason: The selecting datum is genuinely external to the source theory: proof-theoretic (Godel) independence of the sign from GU's good-stable axioms (true in the good model, false in the pathological model of the same theory). Its owner is identified WITHOUT asserting the withdrawn TaF identification: the packet's interfaces name time-as-finality as target_repository with ownership_status joint_seam - a typed request at the GU/TI/TaF boundary, explicitly 'gated and no cross-repo identity is asserted'. Per the adapter-2 correction (present at import pin 77879e5), bar(b)=finality-axis polarity is OPEN; the accountable owner is the typed joint seam, and nothing in this run identifies the datum with any specific TaF object. Located-Is-Not-Forced applies at the seam too.

receiver_judgment.statement: Externality is established at the source's stated grade and the boundary owner is named as a typed joint seam (time-as-finality, joint_seam), which satisfies owner-identification without reopening ADAPTER2-01; selecting WHICH branch, and whether any TaF object in fact supplies the datum, remain open questions owned at that seam.
receiver_judgment.grade: exploration-tier receiver-verified structural judgment; confers no promotion of the source claim (exploration) or its grades
receiver_judgment.verification: Externality: proof_theoretic_independence per /claim/independence_type; owner: /interfaces/1 names time-as-finality with ownership_status joint_seam as a typed request only; the withdrawn identification checked against ADAPTER2-01 correction (present at import pin 77879e5) and NOT asserted anywhere in this run.

falsifiers: The selector is derived within the declared source model (any one of the five methods forcing the sign would do it - all five demonstrably fail to).
No accountable boundary owner is identified in the frozen packet.
The run asserts the withdrawn bar(b)=finality-axis-polarity identity to name the owner (this would fail the gate as a Located-Is-Not-Forced violation, not pass it).
nonclaims: This does not show the named seam supplies or uniquely fixes the selector; the six-condition reopen burden of ADAPTER2-01 is untouched.
Owner identification is at typed-boundary grade, not object-identification grade.

gate_results.status_reason: One explicit argument satisfies the whole chain: every substantive gate above runs on the single frozen joint argument (W211 at d62a82f3, read under annotations A/B/C), the single construction branch (program-native), and the single chain id. No gate borrowed the withdrawn adapter-2 argument, a TaF-side premise, or a second construction branch to pass. Enforced mechanically: evaluate_gate_run.py checks singleton set-equality of chain/branch/argument across gates 1-6 against one_chain_control.

receiver_judgment.statement: The run's success is not assembled from partial successes of different repositories: GU supplies the entire located-not-forced argument; the receiver supplies only typing preservation and annotations; no TI/TaF result is combined in.
receiver_judgment.grade: exploration-tier receiver-verified structural judgment; confers no promotion of the source claim (exploration) or its grades

gate_results.status_reason: The verdict is unchanged under reversal of the physical branch labels: swapping C_good/record-count-Krein-negative with C_path/record-count-Krein-positive exchanges two admissible anchors and alters no gate outcome, because every load-bearing fact is sign-symmetric - the invariant-form dimensions count both branches, W208's fixed-point count is 2 regardless of labeling, W209's non-decidability is label-free, and W210's sign-blindness lemma states Helmholtz self-adjointness holds for eta.C iff it holds for eta. The verdict before and after the swap is NO_BRANCH_SELECTED. The gate has a demonstrated failing direction in this repository: the lane-D aliveness anchor FAILS this same gate (tests/aliveness_neutrality_test.py, exit 0), so neutrality is not a cannot-fail check.

receiver_judgment.statement: No step of this run privileges a branch: the packet's decision_type is not_forced, the receiver selects nothing, and an exact label swap leaves every gate status and the aggregate unchanged; a rule that DID select a branch (aliveness) has already been shown to fail this gate at its stated grade.
receiver_judgment.grade: exploration-tier receiver-verified structural judgment; confers no promotion of the source claim (exploration) or its grades
receiver_judgment.verification: Exact-swap metamorphic control recorded in neutrality_control; sign-blindness of the methods per /quantifiers/3 (W210 lemma) and the two-flipped-anchors finding of the adapter-2 correction; the in-repo failing instance of this gate (lane D aliveness anchor, tests/aliveness_neutrality_test.py) demonstrates the check can fail.

falsifiers: Any gate status or the aggregate changes after an exact reversal of the two branch labels.
A load-bearing fact is found to be sign-asymmetric (e.g. a method result that holds for eta.C but not for eta.(-C)).
nonclaims: One label reversal does not prove invariance under every admissible reformulation.
Label-invariance of the verdict does not show the two branches are physically equivalent - only that this run does not choose between them.

An all-PASS aggregate means the founding specimen is a coherent joint-seam object that survives the charter's structural gates; it does not select a value for the grading sign, clear bar(b) or H59, or reopen the withdrawn bar(b)=finality-axis-polarity identity.
The capability-gate pass is at invariant-branch-inequivalence grade only; demonstrated physical capability change would require the OPEN bar(b)/issuance questions to close.
This run does not make the possibility-to-capability hierarchy universal; it is one specimen.
